vocab.meaning: khoản tiền tiết kiệm dành dụm cho tương lai
vocab.example: People use banks to build a substantial nest egg for their retirement or for their children's education.

vocab.meaning: giữ bí mật/an toàn (về tài chính)
vocab.example: Banks allow individuals to keep their financial transactions and wealth under wraps, providing a layer of privacy and security.

vocab.meaning: giúp ai đó vượt qua giai đoạn khó khăn (về tiền bạc)
vocab.example: Many rely on bank credit lines to tide them over during months when their business revenue is lower than expected.

vocab.meaning: dành dụm cho những lúc túng thiếu/khẩn cấp
vocab.example: The main reason for opening a savings account is to put aside money for a rainy day.

vocab.meaning: làm giàu cho bản thân (thường bằng cách tích lũy tiền bạc)
vocab.example: Sophisticated investors use diverse bank portfolios to feather their nests through various compound interest schemes.

vocab.meaning: có sẵn ngay lập tức/trong tầm tay
vocab.example: With mobile banking, people have their entire financial history right at their fingertips 24/7.

vocab.meaning: quyết toán thu chi/cân bằng ngân sách
vocab.example: Businesses use banking services to help them balance the books and ensure their outgoings do not exceed their income.

vocab.meaning: vung tay quá trán/chi tiêu vượt quá khả năng
vocab.example: Banks offer financial tracking tools that warn users if they are beginning to live beyond their means.

vocab.meaning: cách kiếm tiền rất dễ dàng (ám chỉ lãi suất thụ động)
vocab.example: For some, earning interest on a large deposit feels like money for old rope as the capital grows without any effort.

vocab.meaning: miễn phí (nói về các dịch vụ bổ trợ của ngân hàng)
vocab.example: Some premium banks offer travel insurance or concierge services on the house to attract high-net-worth individuals.
